summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Settings page (Users CRUD, Brands CRUD, General info) and Task Assignee features. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed - Settings page has 3 sections (Users & Agents, Brands, General), Add User dialog has name/role/email/avatar color fields, Kanban has assignee filter dropdown, task cards show assignee badges, task detail dialog shows 'Assigned To' field with dropdown in edit mode, description area has doubled height (120px read, 140px edit with rows=8), New Task dialog has 'Assign To' dropdown.

issues: Minor: Console warning about <span> inside <option> - React hydration warning in select dropdown

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/v1/users returns Jeff and Kit
Backend: POST /api/v1/users creates a new user
Backend: PATCH /api/v1/users/:id updates a user
Backend: DELETE /api/v1/users/:id deletes a user
Backend: GET /api/v1/brands returns all 8+ brands
Backend: POST /api/v1/brands creates a new brand
Backend: PATCH /api/v1/brands/:slug updates a brand
Backend: DELETE /api/v1/brands/:slug deletes a brand
Backend: DELETE /api/v1/brands/all fails (protected)
Backend: GET /api/v1/tasks?assignee=Jeff filters by assignee
Backend: GET /api/v1/tasks?assignee=Kit filters by Kit
Backend: POST /api/v1/tasks accepts assignee field
Backend: PATCH /api/v1/tasks/:id accepts assignee field
Backend: Newly created tasks have assignee field
Backend: Kanban has 4 status columns (open, in_progress, approval, completed)
Backend: GET /api/v1/stats works (regression)
Backend: GET /api/v1/approvals works (regression)
Backend: GET /api/v1/inboxes works (regression)
Backend: GET /api/v1/activity works (regression)
Frontend: Settings nav item in sidebar
Frontend: Settings page shows Users & Agents section with Jeff and Kit
Frontend: Settings page has Brands section with all 8 brands
Frontend: Settings page has General section with info cards
Frontend: Add User button opens dialog with name, role, email, avatar color
Frontend: Kanban has 'All People' assignee filter dropdown
Frontend: Filtering by Jeff shows only Jeff's tasks (2 tasks)
Frontend: Task cards show assignee name with User icon
Frontend: Task detail dialog shows 'Assigned To' field
Frontend: Task detail edit mode has assignee dropdown
Frontend: Task detail description area has minHeight 120px (read mode)
Frontend: Task detail description textarea has minHeight 140px and rows=8 (edit mode)
Frontend: New Task dialog has 'Assign To' dropdown
Regression: Kanban still has 4 columns (Open, In Progress, Approval, Completed)
Regression: Overview loads with all 3 stat cards
Regression: Approvals page loads (37 items)
Regression: Inboxes page loads (5 items)
Regression: Schedule page loads
Regression: Calendar page loads
Regression: Activity page loads
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Console warning about <span> inside <option> in TaskDetailDialog.js assignee select - this is a React hydration warning that doesn't affect functionality but should be cleaned up
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed users, brands, and tasks during testing for CRUD tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Settings page fully tested and working. Has 3 sections: Users & Agents (shows Jeff/Kit with edit/delete), Brands (shows 8 brands with edit/delete), General (info cards). Add User dialog has name, role (human/agent), email, avatar color picker. Task assignee features working: Kanban has 'All People' filter dropdown, task cards show assignee badge, task detail shows 'Assigned To' field with dropdown in edit mode, New Task dialog has 'Assign To' dropdown. Description area height doubled: 120px read mode, 140px edit mode with rows=8. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_settings_assignee_features.py covers Users CRUD, Brands CRUD, and task assignee filtering.
